name: Medieval Team RPG ⚔️ 🛡️
description:
Hello!!! I came here with a different RPG than what I do. I had a lot of fun making the bot and I think you'll like it too. I think that stepping out of your comfort zone is good to enjoy what the world has to offer. I hope you have a good experience, have an amazing day!!!
